policy.comparison: semantic accessor payloads after canonical de-interleaving
policy.animationRequirement: exact Float32 equality to official input
policy.pbrRequirement: embedded BaseColor + Normal + Occlusion + MetallicRoughness, >=512px and >=10KB each
